---
title: ""
---

# About Mia

<p style="font-size: 1.1em; line-height: 1.9; color: #333;">
Mia enjoys baking, going to the movies, and traveling! She graduated with a <strong>Bachelor of Science in Biological Sciences and Double Minor in Psychology and Microbiology</strong> from Clemson University in May 2024. In May 2026, she will graduate with a <strong>Master of Public Health in Epidemiology and Data Science Certificate</strong> from Emory University's Rollins School of Public Health.
</p>
<br>
<br>

<div class="row">

<div class="col-sm-6">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title"><strong><a href="https://scholarblogs.emory.edu/dementiacaregivingmemories/the-frost-lab-at-emory/" style="color:#333;">The Frost Lab</a></strong></h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p><em>Nell Hodgson Woodruff School of Nursing, Emory University</em></p>
<img src="images/DEPS.png" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 10px;"/>
<p>Contributed to the Frost Lab's Dementia Caregiver Preparedness Study (DEPS) through data management, program development, and report preparation. Led the development of a nationwide Community Advisory Board (CAB) framework to coordinate diverse stakeholder expertise and advance the Frost Lab's long-term research goals.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-sm-6">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title"><strong><a href="files/ms_cv_26.pdf" style="color: #333;">Capstone Poster Presentation</a></strong></h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p><em>Rollins School of Public Health, Emory University</em></p>
<a href="images/Poster.png">
<img src="images/Poster2.png" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 10px;"/>
</a>
<p>Evaluated whether the addition of a Supplementary Nutrition Assistance 
(SNA) top-up to Unconditional Food Assistance (UFA) improved nutrition 
outcomes among women and children across Chiradzulu, Phalombe, and Thyolo 
districts in southern Malawi.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
